answers.text: 当前流程存在多个被选中的流股和单元，但核心错误在于进料流股(Cooler Feed)缺失压力规格。冷却器和下游分离器的不确定性警告均由该上游根本原因引发。因此，当前提案专注于补全进料流股的压力设定，待该基础状态修复后，再评估下游单元的响应情况。

summary: 针对进料流股 Cooler Feed 缺失压力设定的问题生成候选提案，以解决由于上游边界条件不完整导致的冷却器和分离器状态不确定问题。

issues.message: Cooler Feed is missing pressure specification.
Overhead Cooler outlet response may still be driven by the incomplete feed pressure state, so the cooler itself is not yet a confirmed root cause.
Overhead Separator behavior still depends on the unresolved upstream feed pressure gap.

proposed_actions.title: 补全 Cooler Feed 压力规格
proposed_actions.rationale: 添加压力规格占位符。由于下游冷却器（cooler-3）和分离器（separator-2）的状态高度依赖进料状态，优先修复此错误有望直接解决下游相关的警告。

citations.label: 诊断 STREAM_SPEC_MISSING
citations.excerpt: Cooler Feed is missing pressure specification.

citations.label: 诊断 COOLER_OUTLET_EFFECT_UNCONFIRMED
citations.excerpt: Overhead Cooler outlet response may still be driven by the incomplete feed pressure state, so the cooler itself is not yet a confirmed root cause.

citations.excerpt: Overhead Separator behavior still depends on the unresolved upstream feed pressure gap.
